ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., KNN, Decision Tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., n_neighbors, metric) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was set */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in MB or GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metric belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the performance metric belongs to */,
  "return_years" TEXT /* Return years for the performance metric */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model on the dataset */,
  "outperform_precision" REAL /* Outperform precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "underperform_precision" REAL /* Underperform precision of the model on the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model on the dataset */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve of the model on the dataset */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model on the dataset (as a JSON string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was set */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the performance metric belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the performance metric belongs to */,
  "return_years" TEXT /* Return years for the performance metric */,
  "training_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the model version on the dataset */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model version on the dataset */,
  "outperform_precision" REAL /* Outperform precision of the model version on the dataset */,
  "underperform_precision" REAL /* Underperform precision of the model version on the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model version on the dataset */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve of the model version on the dataset */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model version on the dataset (as a JSON string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being collaborated with */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration (e.g., active, ended) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_models" (
  "collaboration_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration model */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration the model belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being shared */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model being shared */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration model was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_models_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
